narrative:
Ashtabula Twp township has 10,457 registered voters, with 64.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.1 percentage points.
